content.problemStatement:
Chef is an expert baker. Each cake costs him 303030 coins to make, and then he sells each for 505050 coins.

Today, Chef made a total of NNN cakes and was able to sell MMM cakes. The remaining cakes went unsold and were wasted.

Find out how much money (in coins) Chef made from these cakes. It may be possible that the answer is negative to indicate Chef lost money.


Input Format

The only line of input contains 222 integers - NNN and MMM.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the amount of money Chef made.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Chef made 333 cakes and sold all 333 of them. His profit on each of the cakes was 202020 coins, and hence he made a total of 606060 coins.

Explanation:
Chef had made 333 cakes, costing him 909090 coins, but only 111 of them was sold which got him back 505050 coins. Hence, he lost 90−50=4090 - 50 = 4090−50=40 coins.
